title: Breaking field removal without version bump or deprecation
expected_feedback: Standard: Removing a response field ('phone') is a breaking change — partner integrations that read this field will get null/undefined. Deployed without version bump or deprecation window. For public APIs with partner consumers, breaking changes require: (1) deprecation announcement with Sunset header, (2) minimum 6-month window, (3) migration guide for affected consumers, (4) version bump (/api/v2) or a new field to replace the old one. Never silently remove fields from public API responses.
